$comment: answer: grounded Q&A over the KBs. The plan node decides which KBs to consult (one focused query per KB, empty = skip; the host short-circuits empty queries); respond retrieves from each chosen KB and answers in prose. No build - pure retrieval + explanation. question = the whole $input.
summary: Answer a C++ / Win32 / MSVC question grounded in the knowledge bases (cppref, cppdocs, win32, patterns, guidelines, errors); cite the APIs involved, say plainly when something is not covered.
